backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the SurgiPaw backend defining data types (SurgeryCase, Task, Species, Sex) and CRUD operations for surgery cases and user profiles, with authorization checks via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the canister-unavailable error UX feature to its implementing files (CasesListView.tsx and useQueries.ts) with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key changes, and relationships for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SurgiPaw PWA, referencing the app manifest, icons, theme color, and the main React entry script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for SurgiPaw specifying app name, display mode, theme colors, and icon assets at 192x192 and 512x512 sizes.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy with precaching of app shell assets, runtime caching of static files, and cache cleanup on activation; skips caching for IC API and auth flows.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, navigation between Dashboard and Cases views, profile setup modal display, and sticky header with login button.
frontend/src/components/workflow-icons/I: SVG workflow icon component for the Culture task, rendering a petri dish with bacterial colonies using the culture workflow color token.
SVG workflow icon component for the Daily Summary task, rendering a calendar page with date lines using the dailySummary workflow color token.
SVG workflow icon component for the Discharge Notes task, rendering a document with a checkmark using the dischargeNotes workflow color token.
SVG workflow icon component for the Follow-Up task, rendering a circular arrow (refresh/history) using the followUp workflow color token.
Renders a microscope SVG icon for the 'Histo' workflow step, using WorkflowIconBase with the histo color token and supporting an isCompleted prop.
Renders an imaging workflow icon using a grayscale X-ray bone PNG image, overlaying a cross SVG when isCompleted is true.
Renders a test tube SVG icon for the 'Labs' workflow step using WorkflowIconBase with the labs color token.
Renders a speech bubble SVG icon for the 'PDVM Notified' workflow step using WorkflowIconBase.
Renders a scalpel SVG icon for the 'Surgery Report' workflow step using WorkflowIconBase with the surgeryReport color token.
frontend/src/components/workflow-icons/W: Dispatcher component that maps a workflowType string to the corresponding workflow icon component, passing through the isCompleted prop.
Base wrapper for workflow SVG icons that renders the icon with a consistent size and stroke style, and overlays an X when isCompleted is true.
frontend/src/components/workflow-icons/w: Defines shared design tokens for workflow icons including per-type colors, icon size, and stroke width.
frontend/src/features/auth/components/Lo: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/features/auth/components/Pr: Modal dialog that prompts a new user to enter their name and saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/features/cases/checklist.ts: Defines the CHECKLIST_ITEMS configuration for all workflow task types and provides helper functions to derive task selections, remaining items, and colors from a Task object.
frontend/src/features/cases/components/C: Compact card component for calendar views that displays a surgery case's pet info, complaint, and clickable workflow task icons with toggle-completion support.
Full case card component displaying surgery case details, species icon, workflow task icons with toggle support, and edit/delete actions.
A dialog component for editing an existing surgery case, pre-populating form fields from the provided case data and submitting updates via the useUpdateCase mutation.
A dialog component for creating a new surgery case with patient details and task selection checkboxes, submitting the form via the useCreateCase mutation.
The main list view for surgery cases, combining search, species/task filtering, sorting, and rendering case cards with support for highlighting a specific case and CSV import/export.
A search input component with a clear button for filtering surgery cases by any field.
A dropdown select control for choosing the sort order of the cases list, using predefined sort options.
A popover filter component for filtering cases by species (canine, feline, other), persisting selections to sessionStorage.
A popover filter component for filtering cases by task type and completion status, persisting selections to sessionStorage.
Renders the selected checklist tasks for a surgery case as clickable workflow icons that toggle task completion state.
React component providing CSV import and export functionality for surgery cases, handling file parsing, progress tracking, and creating/updating cases via API mutations with error reporting.
frontend/src/features/cases/components/D: A controlled date input component supporting manual MM/DD/YYYY entry with auto-formatting, validation, calendar popover selection, and auto-advance on completion.
Implements CSV export (serializing SurgeryCase data to a downloadable file) and CSV import (parsing, validating, and mapping rows to case data structures with error collection).
frontend/src/features/cases/csv/caseCsvS: Defines the CSV schema for veterinary surgery case import/export, including column headers, TypeScript row type, valid enum values, and format constants.
frontend/src/features/cases/filtering.ts: Provides pure functions to filter surgery cases by species, task types, incomplete tasks, or fully completed tasks.
frontend/src/features/cases/hooks/useSpe: Custom React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide speech-to-text recording with transcript accumulation, error handling, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/features/cases/parsing/pars: Utility function that preprocesses raw OCR text by normalizing whitespace, correcting common character recognition errors, and removing artifacts, used as a fallback text cleaner.
Parses structured 'Label: Value' text line-by-line and maps recognized labels to CaseFormData fields, handling species, sex, dates, and string fields with voice input variations.
frontend/src/features/cases/pdf/generate: Generates a printable PDF report of surgery cases with incomplete tasks using a hidden iframe and the browser's native print dialog, with color-coded task badges.
Generates and downloads a CSV report of all surgery cases including remaining checklist tasks, with proper field escaping and a timestamped filename.
frontend/src/features/cases/pdf/pdfForma: Provides formatting utility functions for PDF display, converting Time (bigint nanoseconds), Species, and Sex enum values to human-readable strings, plus text truncation.
frontend/src/features/cases/pdf/reportFo: Provides formatting utility functions for CSV reports, converting Time (bigint nanoseconds), Species, and Sex enum values to human-readable strings.
frontend/src/features/cases/search.ts: Filters a list of SurgeryCase objects by a query string, matching against case fields and incomplete checklist task labels.
frontend/src/features/cases/sorting.ts: Defines sort options and a sortCases function that sorts SurgeryCase arrays by arrival date or number of remaining open tasks.
frontend/src/features/cases/types.ts: Defines the CaseFormData interface and constant option arrays for species and sex used in case forms.
frontend/src/features/cases/validation.t: Provides validation functions for case form fields, date parsing (MM/DD/YYYY, ISO), date-to-nanoseconds conversion, and Species/Sex enum parsing utilities.
frontend/src/features/dashboard/componen: Main dashboard React component that displays surgery cases in either a weekly calendar or list view, with filtering, sorting, search, and a new-case dialog.
Weekly calendar React component that renders a 7-column grid of surgery cases grouped by arrival date, with previous/next week navigation.
frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/ca: Utility functions for the calendar view: computing week day arrays, filtering cases by day, formatting week range strings, and checking if a week is the current one.
frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/op: Utility functions to extract and count remaining (open) checklist tasks across surgery cases, returning structured OpenTaskItem objects.
frontend/src/features/settings/component: Empty settings view component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic React hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay (default 500ms) using setTimeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend data operations (cases, user profiles, dashboard, tasks, etc.), plus error classification and user-friendly error message helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a light-blue themed design system, including semantic color tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, charts, and domain-specific elements like patient name, species, complaint, and notes fields.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders the root component wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and a custom `InternetIdentityProvider` for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/types/jspdf-autotable.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for the jspdf-autotable module.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for the jspdf module.
frontend/src/types/tesseract.d.ts: TypeScript ambient module declaration for `tesseract.js`, defining interfaces for OCR workers, recognition results, bounding boxes, and enums for page segmentation and OCR engine modes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with Inter font and custom border radii, and registers the `tailwindcss-animate` and `@tailwindcss/typography` plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for SurgiPaw, an ICP-based case management app, documenting the stopped backend canister issue (IC0508), existing error-handling feature, and a pending request to redeploy the canister.
